Sphinx Features Example

中文

This page demonstrates various Sphinx features and RST syntax that you can use in your documentation.

Code Blocks

Here is an example of a code block with syntax highlighting:

#include <stdio.h>

int main(void)
{
    printf("Hello, World!\n");
    return 0;
}

You can also use the code-block directive with different languages:

def hello():
    print("Hello from Python!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    hello()

echo "Hello from Bash"

Inline Code

Use double backticks for inline code: int x = 5; or function_name().

Tables

Simple Table

Name

Description

Type

GPIO

General Purpose Input/Output

Peripheral

UART

Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter

Communication

SPI

Serial Peripheral Interface

Communication

Grid Table

Header 1

Header 2

Header 3

Cell 1

Cell 2

Cell 3

Cell 4

Cell 5

Cell 6

Notes and Warnings

Note

This is a note. Use notes to provide additional information or tips.

Warning

This is a warning. Use warnings to alert users about potential issues.

Tip

This is a tip. Use tips to share helpful suggestions.

Important

This is important information. Users should pay attention to this.

Example with caption
int example = 42;

Cross-References

You can reference other sections using the :ref: role:

  • Reference to a section: code-blocks

  • Reference to another document: API Guides

For API documentation, you can use:

  • function_name() for functions

  • ClassName for classes

  • method_name() for methods

  • attribute_name for attributes

Lists

Unordered List

  • Item 1

  • Item 2

  • Item 3

    • Nested item 1

    • Nested item 2

Ordered List

  1. First step

  2. Second step

  3. Third step

Definition List

Term 1

Definition of term 1

Term 2

Definition of term 2

Images

Conditional Content

You can include content conditionally using the .. only:: directive:

This content is only visible in HTML builds.

Links

External Links

  • Sphinx Documentation

  • reStructuredText Primer

Internal Links

  • API Guides - Link to the index document

  • Index - Link to the general index

Mathematics

You can include mathematical expressions:

Inline math: \(E = mc^2\)

Block math:

\[\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} dx = \sqrt{\pi}\]

Comments

You can also use This is a text substitution in your text by defining substitutions above.
